name: each red-team-pack finding carries the shared §2.3 findings shape (id, lens, severity)
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null >o.json; node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.findings.every(f=>f.id&&f.lens&&f.severity)?0:1)' && echo w13-findings-format 1>&2
